_comment: issue #210 區級資源包（rural）：一店一包、多類別共用同一郊區 packStyle；既有素材沿用不重生（#196 itemDesc 全數保留，由原 rural-workwear-stall／rural-field-cobbler 合併）。

packStyle.name: 郊區服飾 Rural Outfitter
packStyle.reference: sturdy country fieldwear and trail gear — sailor work tops, field skirts, lace-up boots and woodland tiaras

items.shoes-wild-boots: a pair of rustic brown trail ankle boots with laces, shown from the front as worn standing upright, both boots side by side — do NOT show the soles or a top-down view
items.shoes-plum-boots: a pair of plum field ankle boots with laces, shown from the front as worn standing upright, both boots side by side — do NOT show the soles or a top-down view
items.headtop-wild-tiara: a small woodland tiara woven with tiny wild flowers
items.headtop-aurora-tiara: a small field tiara with soft aurora-tinted gems
